definitions.text: A picture of a celebrity, an event etc., intended to be attached to a wall.
examples: He has posters of his favorite band, sports teams and holiday resorts up.

definitions.text: An advertisement to be posted on a pole, wall etc. to advertise something.
examples: I saw a poster for the film on the side of a bus.
Some posters left the online message board after the squabble.
to poster the walls of a bedroom
